title: Cirrus: Add check for make varlink_api_generate

comments.body: Changes LGTM, but fedora-29 tests are failing with a segv.  Not sure if it's related to this PR or not....

Thanks @TomSweeneyRedHat ya I think it might be flakes, re-ran it a few times and it breaks differently each go :confused:   Folks are chasing some of those problems down, so hopefully a few rebase/pushes and it'll run clean.
mmm...dangit...the new check is doing something strange :confounded:
Okay, few more runs and rebases got it, all green now.
